assertions.title: HrService and PayrollService decomposed into focused services, each under 500 lines

steps.action: wc -l on all HR/Payroll service files
steps.expected: HrService split into EmployeeService, LeaveService, AttendanceService; PayrollService split into PayrollRunService, PayrollCalculationService, PayrollPostingService; each under 500 lines
steps.observed: EmployeeService: 376 lines, LeaveService: 390 lines, AttendanceService: 349 lines, PayrollRunService: 230 lines, PayrollCalculationService: 462 lines, PayrollPostingService: 482 lines, HrService (coordinator/facade): 188 lines, PayrollService (coordinator/facade): 432 lines. All under 500 lines.

steps.action: Verify HrService delegates to focused services
steps.expected: HrService is a thin facade delegating to EmployeeService, LeaveService, AttendanceService
steps.observed: HrService constructor takes EmployeeService, LeaveService, AttendanceService, SalaryStructureTemplateService and all public methods directly delegate. No business logic in HrService itself.

steps.action: Verify PayrollService delegates to focused services
steps.expected: PayrollService delegates to PayrollRunService, PayrollCalculationService, PayrollPostingService
steps.observed: PayrollService constructor creates PayrollRunService, PayrollCalculationService, PayrollPostingService. createPayrollRun delegates to PayrollRunService, calculatePayroll to PayrollCalculationService, approvePayroll/postPayrollToAccounting/markAsPaid to PayrollPostingService.
380 tests run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped. BUILD SUCCESS.

evidence.output: EmployeeService.java: 376, LeaveService.java: 390, AttendanceService.java: 349, PayrollRunService.java: 230, PayrollCalculationService.java: 462, PayrollPostingService.java: 482, HrService.java: 188, PayrollService.java: 432. Total: 2909 lines across 8 files. All under 500. Gate-fast: 380/380 pass.

assertions.title: Employee management with full CRUD and validation

steps.action: Review EmployeeService source for CRUD operations
steps.expected: createEmployee, updateEmployee, deleteEmployee, listEmployees with proper validation for personal info, employment details, payroll config, department, designation
steps.observed: EmployeeService provides: listEmployees(), createEmployee(EmployeeRequest), updateEmployee(Long id, EmployeeRequest), deleteEmployee(Long id). EmployeeRequest record supports firstName, lastName, email, phone, role, hiredDate, dateOfBirth, gender, emergencyContact, department, designation, dateOfJoining, employmentType, employeeType, paymentSchedule, salaryStructureTemplateId, monthlySalary, dailyWage, workingDaysPerMonth, weeklyOffDays, standardHoursPerDay, OT multipliers, PF/ESI/PAN numbers, taxRegime, bank details. Validation includes: PAN format (AAAAA9999A), date chronology (joining after DOB), compensation rules (STAFF requires salary/template, LABOUR requires dailyWage), enum parsing with proper 400 errors, bank details encrypted via CryptoService.

EmployeeServiceTest: 3 tests run, 0 failures. Tests cover: (1) createEmployee_staffTemplateAndBankDetails_areMappedAndEncrypted - verifies salary template assignment, bank encryption, DTO mapping; (2) createEmployee_invalidPanRejected - verifies VALIDATION_INVALID_FORMAT error; (3) createEmployee_labourWithoutDailyWageRejected - verifies VALIDATION_INVALID_INPUT error.

evidence.output: Tests run: 3, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0. BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.title: Leave management with request, approval workflow, and balance tracking

steps.action: Review LeaveService source for leave workflow
steps.expected: Leave requests with type, date range, approval workflow. Leave balance tracking per employee per type per year.
steps.observed: LeaveService provides: listLeaveRequests(), listLeaveTypePolicies(), getLeaveBalances(employeeId, year), createLeaveRequest(LeaveRequestRequest), updateLeaveStatus(id, LeaveStatusUpdateRequest). LeaveStatus lifecycle: PENDING -> APPROVED/REJECTED/CANCELLED. Balance tracking: ensureBalance auto-creates yearly balance from LeaveTypePolicy (annualEntitlement, carryForwardLimit). Approval deducts from balance, rejection/cancellation reverts. Overlap detection prevents duplicate leave ranges. Insufficient balance check before approval.

LeaveServiceTest: 4 tests run, 0 failures. Tests cover: (1) createLeaveRequest_approvedConsumesBalanceAndStoresDays - verifies 3-day leave approval deducts balance (used 1->4, remaining 11->8), totalDays=3.00, approvedBy populated; (2) createLeaveRequest_insufficientBalanceRejected - verifies BUSINESS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when requesting 3 days with only 2 remaining; (3) updateLeaveStatus_approvedToRejectedRestoresBalance - verifies balance revert (used 3->2, remaining 9->10); (4) updateLeaveStatus_invalidTransitionFromApprovedToPendingRejected - verifies BUSINESS_INVALID_STATE.

evidence.output: Tests run: 4, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0. BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.title: Attendance tracking with bulk marking and payroll integration

steps.action: Review AttendanceService source for attendance features
steps.expected: Attendance can be marked individually or in bulk. Daily summary available. Attendance integrates with payroll calculation.
steps.observed: AttendanceService provides: listAttendanceByDate(date), listEmployeeAttendance(employeeId, startDate, endDate), markAttendance(employeeId, MarkAttendanceRequest), bulkMarkAttendance(BulkMarkAttendanceRequest), bulkImportAttendance(AttendanceBulkImportRequest), getTodayAttendanceSummary(), getMonthlyAttendanceSummary(year, month). Statuses: PRESENT, ABSENT, HALF_DAY, LEAVE, HOLIDAY, WEEKEND. Bulk marks batch-lookup employees and use saveAll. Individual marks upsert (find or create). Attendance records feed into PayrollCalculationService.calculateEmployeePay() which iterates attendance between periodStart and periodEnd.

AttendanceServiceTest: 5 tests run, 0 failures. Tests cover: (1) bulkMarkAttendance_usesBatchLookupAndSaveAll - verifies batch lookup, dedup, status=PRESENT, regularHours=8, overtimeHours=1.5; (2) bulkMarkAttendance_unknownEmployeeRejected - verifies VALIDATION_INVALID_REFERENCE; (3) bulkImportAttendance_flattensRecords - verifies multi-record import across dates; (4) monthlySummary_mapsRepositoryProjection - verifies monthly aggregation DTO mapping; (5) markAttendance_invalidStatusRejected - verifies VALIDATION_INVALID_INPUT for invalid status string.

steps.expected: PayrollCalculationService reads attendance records for pay calculation
steps.observed: PayrollCalculationService.calculateEmployeePay() calls attendanceRepository.findByEmployeeAndAttendanceDateBetween() and aggregates presentDays, halfDays, absentDays, leaveDays, holidayDays, regularHours, overtimeHours, doubleOtHours from attendance records. These feed directly into basePay, overtimePay, and deduction calculations.

evidence.output: Tests run: 5, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0. BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.title: Payroll calculation with Indian statutory deductions (PF, ESI, TDS)

steps.expected: Payroll correctly calculates: basic salary, allowances, deductions (PF, ESI, TDS), overtime, leave deductions, net pay
steps.observed: PayrollCalculationService.calculatePayroll() processes each employee: (1) aggregates attendance into present/half/absent/leave/holiday days and OT hours; (2) for template-based staff: prorates basicPay, HRA, DA, specialAllowance by payableRatio = 1 - (leaveWithoutPayDays / workingDaysPerMonth); (3) computes grossPay = basePay + overtimePay + holidayPay; (4) StatutoryDeductionEngine computes PF (12% of basic), ESI (0.75% if gross <= threshold), TDS (projected annual tax / periods), professionalTax; (5) PayrollCalculationSupport computes loanDeduction = min(advanceBalance, gross * 20%); (6) netPay = max(0, grossPay - totalDeductions). All amounts use HALF_UP 2-decimal rounding.

steps.expected: Calculation tests pass with verified numeric results
steps.observed: PayrollCalculationServiceIndianRulesTest: 2 tests run, 0 failures. Test 1 (calculatePayroll_monthlyTemplateEmployee): verifies for template employee with 2 present, 1 half-day, 1 absent, 1 leave, 1 holiday: basicSalaryComponent=13557.69, hraComponent=6778.85, daComponent=2711.54, specialAllowanceComponent=4067.31, basePay=27115.39, leaveWithoutPayDeduction=2884.61, pfDeduction=1626.92, esiDeduction=0.00 (gross > 21000 threshold), professionalTaxDeduction=200.00, loanDeduction=500.00, taxDeduction=326.92, totalDeductions=2653.84, netPay=25615.40. Test 2 (getMonthlyPaySummary): totalGrossPay=28269.24, totalDeductions=2068.94, totalNetPay=26200.30, pfDeduction=1356.92.

evidence.output: Tests run: 2, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0. BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.title: Payroll posting to accounting creates correct journal entries

steps.expected: Approved payroll creates journal entries: salary expense debit, liability credits (PF, ESI, TDS), net pay credit. All entries linked to payroll run.
steps.observed: PayrollPostingService.postPayrollToAccounting() performs: (1) validates APPROVED status; (2) finds required payroll GL accounts (SALARY-EXP, WAGE-EXP, SALARY-PAYABLE, PF-PAYABLE, ESI-PAYABLE, TDS-PAYABLE, PROFESSIONAL-TAX-PAYABLE, EMP-ADV); (3) aggregates totals across all run lines; (4) builds journal: Dr SALARY-EXP/WAGE-EXP for totalGrossPay, Cr SALARY-PAYABLE for residual, Cr PF-PAYABLE/ESI-PAYABLE/TDS-PAYABLE/PROFESSIONAL-TAX-PAYABLE/EMP-ADV for respective totals; (5) posts through accountingFacade.postPayrollRun(); (6) links journalEntryId to run; (7) sets status to POSTED; (8) logs PAYROLL_POSTED audit event with full metadata.

steps.expected: Posting test verifies balanced journal entries with statutory liability lines
steps.observed: PayrollPostingServiceIndianLiabilityTest: 1 test run, 0 failures. Test verifies for grossPay=26538.47: Dr SALARY-EXP=26538.47, Cr SALARY-PAYABLE=24089.62, Cr PF-PAYABLE=1592.31, Cr TDS-PAYABLE=156.54, Cr PROFESSIONAL-TAX-PAYABLE=200.00, Cr EMP-ADV=500.00. Total debit (26538.47) equals total credit (26538.47). Balanced journal confirmed.

4 tests run, 0 failures. Tests verify: (1) rejectsMissingRunIdentity, (2) usesTrimmedRunNumberAndDefaults (ref=PAYROLL-RUN-42, date defaults), (3) usesLegacyRunTokenAndExplicitValues (ref=PAYROLL-LEGACY-77), (4) facadePostPayrollRun_delegatesToAccountingServicePostPayrollRun.

steps.expected: Audit metadata and liability clearing tests pass
steps.observed: TS_PayrollPostedAuditMetadataExecutableCoverageTest: 3 tests pass (audit metadata completeness). TS_PayrollLiabilityClearingPolicyTest: 8 tests pass (liability clearing policy scenarios).

evidence.output: Tests run: 16, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0. BUILD SUCCESS.

assertions.title: HR and payroll module documented in frontend-handoff.md

steps.expected: Complete documentation: endpoint map, user flows, state machines, error codes, data contracts, UI hints
steps.observed: frontend-handoff.md '### HR & Payroll' section (lines 2004-2320, ~316 lines) contains all required sections: (1) Endpoint Map with 5 subsections: Employee management (7 endpoints), Leave (5 endpoints), Attendance (8 endpoints), Payroll (19 endpoints including run lifecycle, payment, payslip). (2) User Flows: Employee onboarding (5 steps), Monthly payroll flow (8 steps), Leave request/approval flow (6 steps). (3) State Machines: Payroll run lifecycle (6 transitions: DRAFT->CALCULATED->APPROVED->POSTED->PAID with idempotency), Leave request lifecycle (5 transitions with rules). (4) DTO Contracts with validation rules: EmployeeRequest (full field list + validation), EmployeeDto, SalaryStructureTemplate, Leave DTOs, Attendance DTOs, Payroll run + summary DTOs, Payment DTOs. (5) Indian Payroll Calculation Formulas (12 documented formulas). (6) Error Codes (10 error codes with frontend handling). (7) UI Hints (8 guidance items). Comprehensive salary structure assignment, tax regime, bank detail encryption, statutory deductions, payslip rendering guidance all documented.

evidence.output: Line 2004: '### HR & Payroll'. Section spans lines 2004-2320 (316 lines). Contains: endpoint map (7+5+8+19=39 endpoints), 3 user flows, 2 state machines, 14 DTO contracts, 12 calculation formulas, 10 error codes, 8 UI hints.

frictions.description: Live app at http://localhost:8081 was not reachable, requiring fallback to test-based + source-contract evidence per user-testing.md guidance
frictions.resolution: Used executable Maven tests (gate-fast 380/380, targeted HR/payroll 43/43) plus source code review as evidence per fallback procedure

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-HR-001: all 8 HR/payroll service files under 500 lines (max 482, PayrollPostingService). VAL-HR-002: Employee CRUD with encrypted bank details, PAN validation, compensation rules (3 tests pass). VAL-HR-003: Leave workflow with balance tracking, overlap detection, approval/rejection/cancellation with balance revert (4 tests pass). VAL-HR-004: Attendance with individual/bulk/import marking, monthly summary, payroll integration (5 tests pass). VAL-HR-005: Full Indian payroll calculation with salary template prorating, PF/ESI/TDS/professional tax/loan deductions verified numerically (2 tests pass). VAL-HR-006: Payroll posting creates balanced journal entries with statutory liability lines, audit metadata, and idempotent replay (16 tests pass across 4 test classes). VAL-DOC-007: frontend-handoff.md HR section complete with 39 endpoints, 3 user flows, 2 state machines, 14 DTO contracts, 12 calculation formulas, 10 error codes, 8 UI hints. Gate-fast baseline: 380/380 pass.
